title: Best piece of Eva 01 Eva 00 Eva 02 merch youve seen
display_title: Best piece of Eva 01 Eva 00 Eva 02 merch youve seen
wikitext:
[]: Best piece of Eva-01/Eva-00/Eva-02 merch you've seen?             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Fri Aug 11, 2006 7:28 am For me? Probably the kick-ass Kaiyodo Revoltech action figures. You can get them at Entertainment Earth or Anime Castle. Post any kind of Eva unit-realated merchandise you've seen! Weather it be a wallscroll, an action figure, or a cigarette ligher, POST IT NOW. You also must provide an in english link/website where you can buy the item you listed if possible.

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Fri Aug 11, 2006 7:47 am Have you really bought a Revoltech figure? The paint job is very very poor I must say. To me the best Eva merch must be the Perfect Grade Eva-01. It's the best.

[]:             Quote Post by the3rdchildren » Fri Aug 11, 2006 9:22 am tinmeigut wrote: Have you really bought a Revoltech figure? The paint job is very very poor I must say.

[]:             Quote Post by Shadow Blaziken » Fri Aug 11, 2006 11:07 am That Perfect Grade Evangelion looks awesome. It's very expensive, though, so I'm probably not going to buy it any time soon. The diecast Soul of Chogokin figures look nice, though. They sell really well on eBay.

[]:             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Sat Aug 12, 2006 6:16 am I got my Revoltech Eva-01 yesterday. I love the detail as well as the posability. Kick-ass, man.

[]:             Quote Post by Shadow Blaziken » Sat Aug 12, 2006 7:30 am I have $20 spending money right now, so I'm gonna buy a Revoltech Eva-02. Comes with a good amount of weapons, too. They're gonna come out with blue Eva-00 and Eva-03 soon.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sat Aug 12, 2006 11:00 am I stand firm in my belief that this fully working scale model is the best NGE merchandise ever:

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Sat Aug 12, 2006 1:30 pm ^ O_O Ohh, cool... Its a shame that I can't put my paws on that... But also fortunate... One day I couldn't resist using it... :twisted: :P

[]:             Quote Post by ZeroFive1 » Sat Aug 12, 2006 7:06 pm This thread is discriminant to eva units 03-013. C'mon, they need love too!

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sat Aug 12, 2006 7:16 pm I like the Bandai model kits.

[]:             Quote Post by LordBlank » Fri Oct 20, 2006 10:34 pm An Eva-01 Bike. That will surely scare the sh*t out of the neighbor's dog.

[]:             Quote Post by LordBlank » Sat Nov 11, 2006 9:04 am http://www.gizmodo.com/gadgets/rss/neon-genesis-evangelion-bike-163005.php or the one you all know, http://gizmodo.com/gadgets//ipod-neon-genesis-evangelion-edition-027706.php Good Choice to everyone else.
